basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS)
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS) Technical Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website tanuvas.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TANUVAS Technical Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation of 5 years is applicable for women/SC/ST/OBC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.V.Sc. in any discipline., M.V.Sc in Meat Science / Livestock Products Technology
qualification.details: M.V.Sc. in any discipline. M.V.Sc in Meat Science / Livestock Products Technology

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- p.m. + HRA (for 1st and 2nd year) and Rs. 42,000/- p.m. + HRA (for 3rd year)

_labels.notification_pdf: Download TANUVAS Technical Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download TANUVAS Technical Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for TANUVAS TECHNICAL FELLOW Recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the TECHNICAL FELLOW position at TANUVAS is scheduled for 08-07-2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the TECHNICAL FELLOW post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.V.Sc. degree in any discipline, with a preference for M.V.Sc. in Meat Science or Livestock Products Technology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the TECHNICAL FELLOW position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the TECHNICAL FELLOW post is 30 years. Age relaxation is provided for specific categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the TECHNICAL FELLOW post?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 37,000 to Rs. 42,000 per month, plus HRA, depending on the year of service.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the TECHNICAL FELLOW post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the TECHNICAL FELLOW position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the TECHNICAL FELLOW role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Exam followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual position. The job type is contractual for the TECHNICAL FELLOW post.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. The exact venue details can be found in the official notification.
